message.content:
Implement the following plan:

# Sketch V1: Object-Design Workspace

## Context

The Sketch module currently has a generic layers/shapes model (rect, ellipse, line, path). The goal is to transform it into a **constrained object-design workspace** where users assemble furniture (tables, desks, shelves, cabinets, bed frames) from typed parts, view them in orthographic drafting views, preview in 3D, and export to sheets — all while keeping Sketch separate from Floorplan logic and reusing shared infrastructure.

## Architecture Decisions

- **Parts/assemblies replace layers/shapes** — layers don't serve furniture design. Parts are atomic 3D primitives; assemblies group them.
- **Single viewport with view switching** (top / front / side) — simpler than multi-viewport CAD; view switcher in toolbar.
- **Coordinate system**: X = left-right, Y = front-back (depth), Z = up-down (height). All millimeters.
- **3D preview** in a right-side panel (like floorplan's ThreePreviewPanel), read-only orbit.
- **Persistence** uses the same localStorage backend pattern with a `sketch-planner-` key prefix.

### Orthographic Projection Mapping
| View  | SVG X      | SVG Y           | SVG W       | SVG H       |
|-------|------------|-----------------|-------------|-------------|
| Top   | position.x | position.y      | partWidth   | partDepth   |
| Front | position.x | -(position.z+h) | partWidth   | partHeight  |
| Side  | position.y | -(position.z+h) | partDepth   | partHeight  |

### Part Types
| Type      | Key Properties                                        | Semantics                   |
|-----------|-------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------|
| Panel     | width, depth, thickness, material                     | Flat slab (tabletop, shelf) |
| Leg       | width, depth, height, profile (square/round/tapered)  | Vertical support            |
| Frame     | width, height, length, axis (x/y)                     | Rail, stretcher, apron      |
| Cutout    | parentId, width, height, depth, offsetX, offsetY      | Subtractive rect on panel   |
| Hole      | parentId, diameter, depth, offsetX, offsetY            | Subtractive circle on panel |
| Dimension | startPoint{x,y,z}, endPoint{x,y,z}, offset, textOverride | Measurement annotation   |

All parts share: `id, type, name, assemblyId, parentId, position:{x,y,z}, rotation:{x,y,z}, fill, stroke, strokeWidth`

---

## Step 1: Domain Models & Constants

**Create** `src/modules/sketch/domain/partModels.js`
- Import `generateId` from `@/domain/ids`
- `createPartBase(type, overrides)` — shared base with id, position, rotation, style
- `createPanel(overrides)` → defaults: width=600, depth=400, thickness=18, material='plywood'
- `createLeg(overrides)` → defaults: width=40, depth=40, height=720, profile='square'
- `createFrame(overrides)` → defaults: width=40, height=60, length=500, axis='x'
- `createCutout(overrides)` → parentId required, width=100, height=50, depth=18
- `createHole(overrides)` → parentId required, diameter=35, depth=18
- `createDimension(overrides)` → startPoint, endPoint, offset=200, textOverride=null

**Create** `src/modules/sketch/domain/partDefaults.js`
- `PART_DEFAULTS` — default dimension sets keyed by part type string
- `MATERIAL_OPTIONS`, `LEG_PROFILE_OPTIONS`, `FRAME_AXIS_OPTIONS` — select dropdown values

**Create** `src/modules/sketch/domain/assemblyModels.js`
- `createAssembly(name, overrides)` → id (generateId('asm')), name, description, category, partIds[]
- `addPartToAssembly(assembly, partId)` → new assembly with partId appended
- `removePartFromAssembly(assembly, partId)` → new assembly with partId filtered

**Create** `src/modules/sketch/domain/viewProjection.js`
- `VIEWS = { TOP:'top', FRONT:'front', SIDE:'side' }`
- `projectPartToView(part, view)` → `{ svgX, svgY, svgWidth, svgHeight }` — core projection
- `viewToModelPosition(svgX, svgY, view, existingPosition)` → `{ x, y, z }` — inverse for placement
- `viewToModelExtents(svgW, svgH, view, partType)` → dimension fields for the given view
- `getPartExtents(part)` → `{ width, depth, height }` normalized across all part types
- `getViewLabel(view)` → 'Top (X–Y)', 'Front (X–Z)', 'Side (Y–Z)'

**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/domain/defaults.js`
- Replace SKETCH_TOOLS: remove RECTANGLE/ELLIPSE/LINE/PEN, add PANEL/LEG/FRAME/CUTOUT/HOLE/DIMENSION
- Add `SKETCH_VIEWS = { TOP:'top', FRONT:'front', SIDE:'side' }`

**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/domain/sketchModels.js`
- `createSketchProject(name)` returns `{ id, name, description, category, canvasWidth, canvasHeight, parts:[], assemblies:[], annotations:[], sheets:[], createdAt, updatedAt }`
- Remove `createLayer`, `createShape`, `createSketchObject` (moved to partModels/assemblyModels)
- Keep `createAnnotation`

---

## Step 2: SketchProvider — Parts/Assemblies State

**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/app/SketchProvider.jsx`

Remove actions: LAYER_ADD/UPDATE/DELETE/REORDER, SHAPE_ADD/UPDATE/DELETE, OBJECT_ADD/UPDATE/DELETE

Add actions:
- `PART_ADD` — `{ part }` → append to project.parts
- `PART_UPDATE` — `{ part: { id, ...changes } }` → merge into matching part (supports nested position/rotation)
- `PART_DELETE` — `{ partId }` → remove from parts, also remove from assembly.partIds, also delete child parts (cutouts/holes with parentId)
- `ASSEMBLY_ADD` — `{ assembly }` → append to project.assemblies
- `ASSEMBLY_UPDATE` — `{ assembly: { id, ...changes } }` → merge
- `ASSEMBLY_DELETE` — `{ assemblyId }` → remove assembly, clear assemblyId on orphaned parts
- `ASSEMBLY_ADD_PART` — `{ assemblyId, partId }` → add partId to assembly.partIds + set part.assemblyId
- `ASSEMBLY_REMOVE_PART` — `{ assemblyId, partId }` → remove from partIds + clear part.assemblyId

Update `useSketch()` return:
```js
{ project, isDirty, canUndo, canRedo, dispatch,
  getPart(id), getAssembly(id), getPartsForAssembly(asmId), getChildParts(parentId) }
```

Remove `getLayer`, `getObject`, `getShapesForObject`. Remove `updateLayer` helper, add `updatePart`/`updateAssembly` helpers.

---

## Step 3: SketchEditorProvider — View State

**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/app/SketchEditorProvider.jsx`

Update initial state:
- Remove: `activeLayerId`, `activeObjectId`
- Add: `activeView: 'top'`, `activeAssemblyId: null`

Add actions:
- `SET_VIEW` — `{ view }` → set activeView
- `SET_ACTIVE_ASSEMBLY` — `{ assemblyId }` → set activeAssemblyId

Remove: `SET_ACTIVE_LAYER`, `SET_ACTIVE_OBJECT`

Remove `initialActiveLayerId` prop from provider component.

---

## Step 4: Part Renderer & View-Aware Canvas

**Create** `src/modules/sketch/renderers/PartRenderer.jsx`
- Props: `{ part, view, isSelected, zoom }`
- Calls `projectPartToView(part, view)` → renders `<rect>` (or `<ellipse>` for holes in top view)
- Selection highlight: dashed outline offset by 4/zoom
- Cutout/hole: dashed stroke, lighter fill to indicate subtractive
- `data-part-id={part.id}` attribute for hit-testing

**Create** `src/modules/sketch/renderers/DimensionRenderer.jsx`
- Props: `{ dimension, view, zoom }`
- Projects dimension's startPoint/endPoint to 2D via view
- Calls `createDimensionFigure` from `@/annotations/dimensions` with 2D projected points
- Renders extension lines, arrowheads, and text label as SVG

**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/renderers/SketchCanvas.jsx`
- Replace `ShapeRenderer` import → `PartRenderer` + `DimensionRenderer`
- Read `activeView` from `useSketchEditor()`
- Replace `visibleShapes` loop → `project.parts.filter(p => p.type !== 'dimension')` for PartRenderer, dimensions separately
- Replace rect/line previews → single generic drag-preview rect for any part tool
- Update status bar: show view label, map cursor coords through projection inverse for XYZ display
- Remove all `activeLayerId` references
- Update `useSketchTool()` switch to match new tool names (panel, leg, frame, cutout, hole, dimension)

**Delete** `src/modules/sketch/renderers/ShapeRenderer.jsx` (replaced by PartRenderer)

---

## Step 5: Editor Handlers

**Create** `src/modules/sketch/editor/handlers/partPlaceHandler.js`
- `createPartPlaceHandler({ dispatch, editorDispatch, activeView, activeAssemblyId, partType })`
- Generic click-drag handler for panel, leg, frame (and cutout when a panel is selected)
- onMouseDown: start drawing (record startPos)
- onMouseMove: update preview (record currentPos)
- onMouseUp: compute 2D extents → `viewToModelPosition` + `viewToModelExtents` → create part via factory → `PART_ADD` → auto `ASSEMBLY_ADD_PART` if activeAssemblyId
- For cutout/hole: requires selectedId to be a panel; sets `parentId` on created part; positions relative to parent

**Create** `src/modules/sketch/editor/handlers/dimensionHandler.js`
- `createDimensionHandler({ dispatch, editorDispatch, activeView })`
- Two-click: first click sets startPoint, second click creates dimension
- Projects 2D clicks to 3D via `viewToModelPosition`
- Creates dimension via `createDimension`, dispatches `PART_ADD`

**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/editor/handlers/selectHandler.js`
- Replace shape hit-testing → part hit-testing using `projectPartToView`
- Iterate parts in reverse, test point-in-projected-rect with zoom-aware tolerance
- Delete dispatches `PART_DELETE` instead of `SHAPE_DELETE`
- Drag-to-move: delta in SVG space → `viewToModelPosition` delta → `PART_UPDATE` position
- Remove all layer/shape references

**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/editor/tools.js`
- New shortcuts: V=select, P=panel, G=leg, F=frame, C=cutout, H=hole, M=dimension

**Delete** `src/modules/sketch/editor/handlers/rectangleHandler.js`, `lineHandler.js` (replaced by partPlaceHandler)

---

## Step 6: Toolbar, Sidebar, Properties Panel

**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/ui/SketchToolbar.jsx`
- Replace tool buttons: Select, Panel, Leg, Frame, Cutout, Hole, Dimension (with new SVG icons)
- Add view switcher group: Top / Front / Side buttons (dispatches `SET_VIEW`)
- Keep undo/redo, grid/snap toggles

**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/ui/SketchSidebar.jsx`
- Replace Objects + Layers sections → Assemblies + Parts sections
- Assemblies: list with add/delete, click sets activeAssemblyId, shows part count
- Parts: list (filtered to active assembly if set), shows type badge + name, click selects, delete button
- Remove all layer-related code

**Create** `src/modules/sketch/ui/SketchPropertiesPanel.jsx` + `.module.css`
- Reads selectedId from editor, gets part via `getPart()`
- Sections: Name (text), Type (badge), Position (X/Y/Z number inputs), Dimensions (type-specific fields), Style (fill/stroke), Assembly (assign/unassign)
- Uses `InputField` from `@/core/ui` for number inputs
- Dispatches `PART_UPDATE` on change

**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/ui/SketchEmptyState.jsx`
- "Start Drawing" → activates panel tool
- "Try Demo Object" → creates demo table from parts (Step 7)

**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/SketchWorkspace.jsx` + `.module.css`
- Remove `initialActiveLayerId` prop plumbing
- Add right panel containing `SketchPropertiesPanel` (top) and 3D preview (bottom, Step 7)
- Grid: `toolbar toolbar toolbar / sidebar canvas rightpanel`

---

## Step 7: 3D Preview & Demo Object

**Create** `src/modules/sketch/renderers/buildSketchPreview.js`
- `buildSketchPreviewRoot(parts, selectedId)` → `THREE.Group`
- `createPanelMesh(part)` → `BoxGeometry(width, thickness, depth)` + MeshStandardMaterial
- `createLegMesh(part)` → BoxGeometry (square profile) or CylinderGeometry (round profile)
- `createFrameMesh(part)` → BoxGeometry along axis
- Coordinate mapping: Three.x = part.x + w/2, Three.y = part.z + h/2, Three.z = part.y + d/2
- Selection: tint material color for selectedId
- Edge outlines via `EdgesGeometry` + `LineSegments`
- Skip dimension/cutout/hole in 3D for V1

**Create** `src/modules/sketch/renderers/SketchPreviewPanel.jsx` + `.module.css`
- Uses `createPreviewViewport` from `@/three/viewer/createPreviewViewport`
- Uses `createInspectNavigation` from `@/three/viewer/createInspectNavigation` (orbit only)
- On parts change: rebuild root via `buildSketchPreviewRoot`, set scene
- ResizeObserver for responsive sizing
- Cleanup via `disposeScene` from `@/three/viewer/disposeScene`
- Header "3D Preview", container div, minimal controls hint footer

**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/domain/demoObject.js`
- Rewrite `buildDemoTable()` → returns `{ assembly, parts }` using part factories
- Demo: 1200×600 tabletop panel at z=720, 4 legs at corners z=0

---

## Step 8: Persistence & Sheet/Export

**Create** `src/modules/sketch/persistence/sketchLocalStorageBackend.js`
- Same pattern as `src/persistence/localStorageBackend.js` with `sketch-planner-` prefix

**Create** `src/modules/sketch/persistence/sketchSerialize.js`
- `sketchSerialize(project)` → `{ schemaType:'sketch', schemaVersion:1, data:project, savedAt }`

**Create** `src/modules/sketch/persistence/sketchDeserialize.js`
- `sketchDeserialize(json)` → validates schemaType='sketch', required fields → `{ project, savedAt }`

**Create** `src/modules/sketch/persistence/sketchStorage.js`
- `saveSketchProject(project)`, `loadSketchProject(id)`, `listSketchProjects()`, `deleteSketchProject(id)`
- Uses sketch backend + serialize/deserialize

**Wire autosave** in `SketchWorkspace.jsx`
- Simple useEffect: if isDirty, setTimeout 5s → saveSketchProject → dispatch MARK_SAVED

**Create** `src/modules/sketch/export/sketchSheetExport.js`
- `exportSketchSvg(project)` → generates SVG string with top/front/side views arranged on A4 sheet
- Uses `PAPER_PRESETS` from `@/sheets/paper` for page dimensions
- Uses `projectPartToView` from viewProjection for each view
- Includes title block text (project name, date)
- Add "Export SVG" button in toolbar that triggers file download via Blob + URL.createObjectURL

---

## File Summary

### New files (18)
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `domain/partModels.js` | Part factory functions |
| `domain/partDefaults.js` | Default dimensions per type |
| `domain/assemblyModels.js` | Assembly factory + helpers |
| `domain/viewProjection.js` | 3D↔2D orthographic projection |
| `editor/handlers/partPlaceHandler.js` | Click-drag part placement |
| `editor/handlers/dimensionHandler.js` | Two-click dimension placement |
| `renderers/PartRenderer.jsx` | 2D part rendering per view |
| `renderers/DimensionRenderer.jsx` | Dimension annotation rendering |
| `renderers/SketchPreviewPanel.jsx` | Three.js 3D preview panel |
| `renderers/SketchPreviewPanel.module.css` | Preview panel styles |
| `renderers/buildSketchPreview.js` | Part → THREE.Mesh conversion |
| `ui/SketchPropertiesPanel.jsx` | Selected part property editor |
| `ui/SketchPropertiesPanel.module.css` | Properties panel styles |
| `persistence/sketchLocalStorageBackend.js` | localStorage with sketch prefix |
| `persistence/sketchSerialize.js` | Sketch project serialization |
| `persistence/sketchDeserialize.js` | Sketch project deserialization |
| `persistence/sketchStorage.js` | Save/load/list/delete API |
| `export/sketchSheetExport.js` | SVG sheet export |

### Modified files (12)
| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `domain/defaults.js` | New tool + view constants |
| `domain/sketchModels.js` | Parts/assemblies project model |
| `domain/demoObject.js` | Demo table from parts |
| `app/SketchProvider.jsx` | Part/assembly reducer actions |
| `app/SketchEditorProvider.jsx` | activeView, remove layer state |
| `renderers/SketchCanvas.jsx` | View-aware part rendering |
| `editor/handlers/selectHandler.js` | Part hit-testing + move |
| `editor/tools.js` | New keyboard shortcuts |
| `ui/SketchToolbar.jsx` | Part tools + view switcher |
| `ui/SketchSidebar.jsx` | Assemblies/parts panels |
| `ui/SketchEmptyState.jsx` | Updated for parts |
| `SketchWorkspace.jsx` + `.module.css` | Right panel layout |

### Deleted files (3)
| File | Reason |
|------|--------|
| `renderers/ShapeRenderer.jsx` | Replaced by PartRenderer |
| `editor/handlers/rectangleHandler.js` | Replaced by partPlaceHandler |
| `editor/handlers/lineHandler.js` | Replaced by partPlaceHandler |

### Shared infrastructure reused (not modified)
- `src/domain/ids.js` — `generateId()`
- `src/geometry/point.js` — distance, subtract, normalize, scale
- `src/geometry/line.js` — distanceToSegment (dimension hit-testing)
- `src/annotations/dimensions.js` — `createDimensionFigure()` for dimension rendering
- `src/three/viewer/createPreviewViewport.js` — WebGL viewport setup
- `src/three/viewer/createInspectNavigation.js` — orbit controls
- `src/three/viewer/disposeScene.js` — cleanup
- `src/sheets/paper.js` — paper presets for export
- `src/core/ui/` — InputField, Modal, Tooltip

---

## Verification

1. `npm run build` passes after each step
2. Navigate to `/sketch` — empty state overlay appears
3. Click "Try Demo Object" — desk appears in top view, parts listed in sidebar, 3D preview shows table
4. Switch views (Top / Front / Side) — parts re-project correctly
5. Select panel tool → click-drag → panel created with correct 3D position
6. Select a part → properties panel shows editable fields → change width → canvas and 3D update
7. Create assembly → assign parts → sidebar shows grouping
8. Place dimension → two clicks → measurement annotation renders
9. Refresh page → project auto-loaded from localStorage
10. Click "Export SVG" → downloads A4 sheet with 3-view layout

## Context

|-----------|-------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------|
| Panel     | width, depth, thickness, material                     | Flat slab (tabletop, shelf) |

All parts share: `id, type, name, assemblyId, parentId, position:{x,y,z}, rotation:{x,y,z}, fill, stroke, strokeWidth`

## Step 1: Domain Models & Constants

- Replace rect/line previews → single generic drag-preview rect for any part tool
- Update status bar: show view label, map cursor coords through projection inverse for XYZ display
- Remove all `activeLayerId` references
- Update `useSketchTool()` switch to match new tool names (panel, leg, frame, cutout, hole, dimension)

**Delete** `src/modules/sketch/renderers/ShapeRenderer.jsx` (replaced by PartRenderer)

---

## Step 5: Editor Handlers

**Create** `src/modules/sketch/editor/handlers/partPlaceHandler.js`
- `createPartPlaceHandler({ dispatch, editorDispatch, activeView, activeAssemblyId, partType })`
- Generic click-drag handler for panel, leg, frame (and cutout when a panel is selected)
- onMouseDown: start drawing (record startPos)
- onMouseMove: update preview (record currentPos)
- onMouseUp: compute 2D extents → `viewToModelPosition` + `viewToModelExtents` → create part via factory → `PART_ADD` → auto `ASSEMBLY_ADD_PART` if activeAssemblyId
- For cutout/hole: requires selectedId to be a panel; sets `parentId` on created part; positions relative to parent

**Create** `src/modules/sketch/editor/handlers/dimensionHandler.js`
- `createDimensionHandler({ dispatch, editorDispatch, activeView })`
- Two-click: first click sets startPoint, second click creates dimension
- Projects 2D clicks to 3D via `viewToModelPosition`
- Creates dimension via `createDimension`, dispatches `PART_ADD`

**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/editor/handlers/selectHandler.js`
- Replace shape hit-testing → part hit-testing using `projectPartToView`
- Iterate parts in reverse, test point-in-projected-rect with zoom-aware tolerance
- Delete dispatches `PART_DELETE` instead of `SHAPE_DELETE`
- Drag-to-move: delta in SVG space → `viewToModelPosition` delta → `PART_UPDATE` position
- Remove all layer/shape references

**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/editor/tools.js`
- New shortcuts: V=select, P=panel, G=leg, F=frame, C=cutout, H=hole, M=dimension

**Delete** `src/modules/sketch/editor/handlers/rectangleHandler.js`, `lineHandler.js` (replaced by partPlaceHandler)

---

## Step 6: Toolbar, Sidebar, Properties Panel

**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/ui/SketchToolbar.jsx`
- Replace tool buttons: Select, Panel, Leg, Frame, Cutout, Hole, Dimension (with new SVG icons)
- Add view switcher group: Top / Front / Side buttons (dispatches `SET_VIEW`)
- Keep undo/redo, grid/snap toggles

**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/ui/SketchSidebar.jsx`
- Replace Objects + Layers sections → Assemblies + Parts sections
- Assemblies: list with add/delete, click sets activeAssemblyId, shows part count
- Parts: list (filtered to active assembly if set), shows type badge + name, click selects, delete button
- Remove all layer-related code

**Create** `src/modules/sketch/ui/SketchPropertiesPanel.jsx` + `.module.css`
- Reads selectedId from editor, gets part via `getPart()`
- Sections: Name (text), Type (badge), Position (X/Y/Z number inputs), Dimensions (type-specific fields), Style (fill/stroke), Assembly (assign/unassign)
- Uses `InputField` from `@/core/ui` for number inputs
- Dispatches `PART_UPDATE` on change

**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/ui/SketchEmptyState.jsx`
- "Start Drawing" → activates panel tool
- "Try Demo Object" → creates demo table from parts (Step 7)

**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/SketchWorkspace.jsx` + `.module.css`
- Remove `initialActiveLayerId` prop plumbing
- Add right panel containing `SketchPropertiesPanel` (top) and 3D preview (bottom, Step 7)
- Grid: `toolbar toolbar toolbar / sidebar canvas rightpanel`

---

## Step 7: 3D Preview & Demo Object

**Create** `src/modules/sketch/renderers/buildSketchPreview.js`
- `buildSketchPreviewRoot(parts, selectedId)` → `THREE.Group`
- `createPanelMesh(part)` → `BoxGeometry(width, thickness, depth)` + MeshStandardMaterial
- `createLegMesh(part)` → BoxGeometry (square profile) or CylinderGeometry (round profile)
- `createFrameMesh(part)` → BoxGeometry along axis
- Coordinate mapping: Three.x = part.x + w/2, Three.y = part.z + h/2, Three.z = part.y + d/2
- Selection: tint material color for selectedId
- Edge outlines via `EdgesGeometry` + `LineSegments`
- Skip dimension/cutout/hole in 3D for V1

**Create** `src/modules/sketch/renderers/SketchPreviewPanel.jsx` + `.module.css`
- Uses `createPreviewViewport` from `@/three/viewer/createPreviewViewport`
- Uses `createInspectNavigation` from `@/three/viewer/createInspectNavigation` (orbit only)
- On parts change: rebuild root via `buildSketchPreviewRoot`, set scene
- ResizeObserver for responsive sizing
- Cleanup via `disposeScene` from `@/three/viewer/disposeScene`
- Header "3D Preview", container div, minimal controls hint footer

**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/domain/demoObject.js`
- Rewrite `buildDemoTable()` → returns `{ assembly, parts }` using part factories
- Demo: 1200×600 tabletop panel at z=720, 4 legs at corners z=0

---

## Step 8: Persistence & Sheet/Export

**Create** `src/modules/sketch/persistence/sketchLocalStorageBackend.js`
- Same pattern as `src/persistence/localStorageBackend.js` with `sketch-planner-` prefix

**Create** `src/modules/sketch/persistence/sketchSerialize.js`
- `sketchSerialize(project)` → `{ schemaType:'sketch', schemaVersion:1, data:project, savedAt }`

**Create** `src/modules/sketch/persistence/sketchDeserialize.js`
- `sketchDeserialize(json)` → validates schemaType='sketch', required fields → `{ project, savedAt }`

**Create** `src/modules/sketch/persistence/sketchStorage.js`
- `saveSketchProject(project)`, `loadSketchProject(id)`, `listSketchProjects()`, `deleteSketchProject(id)`
- Uses sketch backend + serialize/deserialize

**Wire autosave** in `SketchWorkspace.jsx`
- Simple useEffect: if isDirty, setTimeout 5s → saveSketchProject → dispatch MARK_SAVED

**Create** `src/modules/sketch/export/sketchSheetExport.js`
- `exportSketchSvg(project)` → generates SVG string with top/front/side views arranged on A4 sheet
- Uses `PAPER_PRESETS` from `@/sheets/paper` for page dimensions
- Uses `projectPartToView` from viewProjection for each view
- Includes title block text (project name, date)
- Add "Export SVG" button in toolbar that triggers file download via Blob + URL.createObjectURL

---

## File Summary

### New files (18)
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `domain/partModels.js` | Part factory functions |
| `domain/partDefaults.js` | Default dimensions per type |
| `domain/assemblyModels.js` | Assembly factory + helpers |
| `domain/viewProjection.js` | 3D↔2D orthographic projection |
| `editor/handlers/partPlaceHandler.js` | Click-drag part placement |
| `editor/handlers/dimensionHandler.js` | Two-click dimension placement |
| `renderers/PartRenderer.jsx` | 2D part rendering per view |
| `renderers/DimensionRenderer.jsx` | Dimension annotation rendering |
| `renderers/SketchPreviewPanel.jsx` | Three.js 3D preview panel |
| `renderers/SketchPreviewPanel.module.css` | Preview panel styles |
| `renderers/buildSketchPreview.js` | Part → THREE.Mesh conversion |
| `ui/SketchPropertiesPanel.jsx` | Selected part property editor |
| `ui/SketchPropertiesPanel.module.css` | Properties panel styles |
| `persistence/sketchLocalStorageBackend.js` | localStorage with sketch prefix |
| `persistence/sketchSerialize.js` | Sketch project serialization |
| `persistence/sketchDeserialize.js` | Sketch project deserialization |
| `persistence/sketchStorage.js` | Save/load/list/delete API |
| `export/sketchSheetExport.js` | SVG sheet export |

### Modified files (12)
| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `domain/defaults.js` | New tool + view constants |
| `domain/sketchModels.js` | Parts/assemblies project model |
| `domain/demoObject.js` | Demo table from parts |
| `app/SketchProvider.jsx` | Part/assembly reducer actions |
| `app/SketchEditorProvider.jsx` | activeView, remove layer state |
| `renderers/SketchCanvas.jsx` | View-aware part rendering |
| `editor/handlers/selectHandler.js` | Part hit-testing + move |
| `editor/tools.js` | New keyboard shortcuts |
| `ui/SketchToolbar.jsx` | Part tools + view switcher |
| `ui/SketchSidebar.jsx` | Assemblies/parts panels |
| `ui/SketchEmptyState.jsx` | Updated for parts |
| `SketchWorkspace.jsx` + `.module.css` | Right panel layout |

### Deleted files (3)
| File | Reason |
|------|--------|
| `renderers/ShapeRenderer.jsx` | Replaced by PartRenderer |
| `editor/handlers/rectangleHandler.js` | Replaced by partPlaceHandler |
| `editor/handlers/lineHandler.js` | Replaced by partPlaceHandler |

### Shared infrastructure reused (not modified)
- `src/domain/ids.js` — `generateId()`
- `src/geometry/point.js` — distance, subtract, normalize, scale
- `src/geometry/line.js` — distanceToSegment (dimension hit-testing)
- `src/annotations/dimensions.js` — `createDimensionFigure()` for dimension rendering
- `src/three/viewer/createPreviewViewport.js` — WebGL viewport setup
- `src/three/viewer/createInspectNavigation.js` — orbit controls
- `src/three/viewer/disposeScene.js` — cleanup
- `src/sheets/paper.js` — paper presets for export
- `src/core/ui/` — InputField, Modal, Tooltip

---

## Verification

1. `npm run build` passes after each step
2. Navigate to `/sketch` — empty state overlay appears
3. Click "Try Demo Object" — desk appears in top view, parts listed in sidebar, 3D preview shows table
4. Switch views (Top / Front / Side) — parts re-project correctly
5. Select panel tool → click-drag → panel created with correct 3D position
6. Select a part → properties panel shows editable fields → change width → canvas and 3D update
7. Create assembly → assign parts → sidebar shows grouping
8. Place dimension → two clicks → measurement annotation renders
9. Refresh page → project auto-loaded from localStorage
10. Click "Export SVG" → downloads A4 sheet with 3-view layout

content.text:
Perfect. Now I'll provide a comprehensive summary of the sketch module.

## Comprehensive Sketch Module Exploration Report

I have thoroughly explored the sketch module at `src/modules/sketch/` and all related shared infrastructure. Here's a complete breakdown:

### Overview Statistics
- **Total LOC in sketch module**: 2,570 lines across 22 files
- **Structure**: Modular architecture with domain, state management, renderers, handlers, and UI components
- **Patterns**: React Hooks (useReducer, useContext), handler pattern for tools, factory functions for models

---

## 1. DOMAIN MODELS

### File: `/c/Users/johnm/modular apartment planner/src/modules/sketch/domain/sketchModels.js`
**Factory functions for creating domain objects:**
- `createSketchProject(name)` - Creates a project with A4 landscape canvas (297000 x 210000 mm), layers array, objects, annotations

```javascript
}
```

**Hit testing:**
- Iterates layers in reverse (z-order), shapes in reverse (top-first)
- Tolerates 6px / zoom around shape boundaries
- Shape-specific hit tests:
  - **rect**: AABB with tolerance
  - **ellipse**: Ellipse equation with tolerance
  - **line**: Distance to line segment
  - **path**: Distance to any segment

1. `onMouseDown` - Start drawing if activeLayerId set
2. `onMouseMove` - Update currentPos for preview
3. `onMouseUp` - Create shape if width & height > 10mm
4. Reset toolState after draw

**Status messages:**
- "Select a layer before drawing" if no activeLayerId
- "Rectangle: WWW x HHH mm" after creation

**Preview state:**

### File: `/c/Users/johnm/modular apartment planner/src/modules/sketch/editor/handlers/lineHandler.js` (124 lines)
**Line drawing tool**

**Features:**
- Shift+drag constrains to 45-degree angles (8 directions)
- Angle snapping: `Math.round(angle / (π/4)) * (π/4)`
- Min length: 10mm
- Status message: "Line: LLL mm"

**45-degree constraint logic:**
```javascript
if (e.shiftKey) {
  const angle = Math.atan2(dy, dx);
  const snapAngle = Math.round(angle / (π/4)) * (π/4);
  endPos = {
    x: startPos.x + Math.cos(snapAngle) * len,
    y: startPos.y + Math.sin(snapAngle) * len
  }
}
```

## 8. ARCHITECTURAL PATTERNS & KEY INSIGHTS

### Data Flow
```
User Input (Canvas)
→ Tool Handler (selectHandler, rectangleHandler, lineHandler)
→ dispatch(action) to SketchProvider + SketchEditorProvider
→ Reducers update state
→ Components re-render (SketchCanvas, SketchSidebar, SketchToolbar)
→ SVG canvas updates via ShapeRenderer
```

### Handler Pattern
Each tool is an object with:
- `onMouseDown(modelPos, e, toolState)`
- `onMouseMove(modelPos, e, toolState, selectedId)`
- `onMouseUp(modelPos, e, toolState)`
- `onKeyDown(e, toolState, selectedId)`
- `getCursor(toolState)` → cursor style

### State Separation
- **SketchProvider**: Permanent data (project, shapes, objects, layers)
- **SketchEditorProvider**: Ephemeral UI state (tool, selection, viewport, grid toggle)
- **Handler toolState**: Tool-specific drawing state (startPos, currentPos, drawing)

### Coordinate System
- **Model coordinates**: All shapes stored in millimeters
- **Screen coordinates**: Canvas pixel positions
- **Conversion**: `screenToModel(screenX, screenY, viewport, svgRect)`
  - Uses `viewport.zoom` and `viewport.panX/Y` for transformation
  - Inverse: SVG uses `transform="translate(panX, panY) scale(zoom)"`

### Selection & Hit Testing
- Top-most shape in reverse layer order wins (z-order correct)
- Tolerance-based: 6px / zoom for easier clicking
- Shape-type-specific hit tests (AABB, ellipse equation, line distance)

### Zoom & Pan
- Pan: Space+LMB or Middle Mouse
- Zoom: Mouse wheel
- Zoom center: Mouse cursor (pivot point preserved)
- Constraints: 0.02x - 3.0x, factor 1.1

---

```
├── index.js                                 (Export SketchWorkspace)
├── SketchWorkspace.jsx                      (Root component, grid layout)

├── app/

│   └── SketchEditorProvider.jsx             (UI state + useSketchEditor hook)
├── domain/
│   ├── sketchModels.js                      (Factory functions)
│   ├── defaults.js                          (Constants & config)
│   └── demoObject.js                        (Demo table generator)
├── editor/
│   ├── tools.js                             (Tool shortcuts mapping)
│   └── handlers/
│       ├── selectHandler.js                 (Selection & deletion)
│       ├── rectangleHandler.js              (Rectangle drawing)
│       └── lineHandler.js                   (Line drawing, 45° snap)
├── renderers/
│   ├── SketchCanvas.jsx                     (Main SVG canvas)
│   ├── SketchCanvas.module.css              (Canvas styles)
│   ├── ShapeRenderer.jsx                    (Individual shape rendering)
│   └── GridRenderer.jsx                     (Grid pattern rendering)
└── ui/
    ├── SketchToolbar.jsx                    (Tool palette, undo/redo)
    ├── SketchToolbar.module.css             (Toolbar styles)
    ├── SketchSidebar.jsx                    (Layers & objects panels)
    ├── SketchSidebar.module.css             (Sidebar styles)
    ├── SketchEmptyState.jsx                 (Empty state overlay)
    └── SketchEmptyState.module.css          (Empty state styles)
```

---

## 10. KEY TECHNICAL DETAILS

### Grid System
- Minor: 50mm × 50mm cells
- Major: 1000mm × 1000mm (contains 20×20 minor grid)
- Non-scaling stroke for zoom independence
- SVG pattern-based (efficient, infinite)

### Shape Storage Format
```javascript
{
  id: "shape_...",
  type: 'rect'|'ellipse'|'line'|'path',
  layerId: "layer_...",
  x: number, y: number,
  width: number, height: number,
  points: [{x, y}, ...],  // For line/path
  fill: string,
  stroke: string,
  strokeWidth: number,
  rotation: degrees
}
```

### Canvas Sizing
- Default: 297 × 210 mm (A4 landscape)
- Stored in mm, rendered via SVG transform
- Boundary shown as dashed outline
- Extensible: Can support custom sizes

### History System
- Snapshots stored as JSON strings
- Max 80 entries (HISTORY_LIMIT)
- Undo empties future array
- Redo pops from future array
- Dirty flag: Compares current to savedSnapshot

### Empty State Logic
```javascript
showEmptyState = !hasShapes && !hasObjects && !emptyStateDismissed
```
Dismissable by drawing or selecting "Try Demo Object"

---

## 11. INTEGRATION POINTS

### Uses from Main App
- `@/domain/ids` - generateId()
- `@/ui/` - Modal, InputField, Tooltip, CompassOverlay (via core)
- `@/three/viewer` - ThreePreviewPanel (sibling module)
- `@/persistence/localStorageBackend` - Storage (potential future)

### Can be used by Main App
- `SketchWorkspace` - Full-page sketch editor
- `useSketch()` - Access model data and dispatch
- `useSketchEditor()` - Access UI state and dispatch
- Domain models: createSketchProject, createSketchObject, createShape, etc.

---

This comprehensive exploration covers all 22 files with detailed understanding of the architecture, data flow, UI/UX patterns, and integration points.

```javascript
}
```

**Hit testing:**
- Iterates layers in reverse (z-order), shapes in reverse (top-first)
- Tolerates 6px / zoom around shape boundaries

  - **ellipse**: Ellipse equation with tolerance
  - **line**: Distance to line segment
  - **path**: Distance to any segment

4. Reset toolState after draw

**Status messages:**

### File: `/c/Users/johnm/modular apartment planner/src/modules/sketch/editor/handlers/lineHandler.js` (124 lines)

- Angle snapping: `Math.round(angle / (π/4)) * (π/4)`
- Min length: 10mm
- Status message: "Line: LLL mm"

**45-degree constraint logic:**
```javascript
if (e.shiftKey) {
  const angle = Math.atan2(dy, dx);
  const snapAngle = Math.round(angle / (π/4)) * (π/4);
  endPos = {
    x: startPos.x + Math.cos(snapAngle) * len,
    y: startPos.y + Math.sin(snapAngle) * len
  }
}
```

## 8. ARCHITECTURAL PATTERNS & KEY INSIGHTS

### Data Flow
```
User Input (Canvas)
→ Tool Handler (selectHandler, rectangleHandler, lineHandler)
→ dispatch(action) to SketchProvider + SketchEditorProvider
→ Reducers update state
→ Components re-render (SketchCanvas, SketchSidebar, SketchToolbar)
→ SVG canvas updates via ShapeRenderer
```

### Handler Pattern
Each tool is an object with:
- `onMouseDown(modelPos, e, toolState)`
- `onMouseMove(modelPos, e, toolState, selectedId)`
- `onMouseUp(modelPos, e, toolState)`
- `onKeyDown(e, toolState, selectedId)`
- `getCursor(toolState)` → cursor style

### State Separation
- **SketchProvider**: Permanent data (project, shapes, objects, layers)
- **SketchEditorProvider**: Ephemeral UI state (tool, selection, viewport, grid toggle)
- **Handler toolState**: Tool-specific drawing state (startPos, currentPos, drawing)

### Coordinate System
- **Model coordinates**: All shapes stored in millimeters
- **Screen coordinates**: Canvas pixel positions
- **Conversion**: `screenToModel(screenX, screenY, viewport, svgRect)`
  - Uses `viewport.zoom` and `viewport.panX/Y` for transformation
  - Inverse: SVG uses `transform="translate(panX, panY) scale(zoom)"`

### Selection & Hit Testing
- Top-most shape in reverse layer order wins (z-order correct)
- Tolerance-based: 6px / zoom for easier clicking
- Shape-type-specific hit tests (AABB, ellipse equation, line distance)

### Zoom & Pan
- Pan: Space+LMB or Middle Mouse
- Zoom: Mouse wheel
- Zoom center: Mouse cursor (pivot point preserved)
- Constraints: 0.02x - 3.0x, factor 1.1

---

```
├── domain/

├── editor/

│   └── handlers/
│       ├── selectHandler.js                 (Selection & deletion)
│       ├── rectangleHandler.js              (Rectangle drawing)
│       └── lineHandler.js                   (Line drawing, 45° snap)
├── renderers/
│   ├── SketchCanvas.jsx                     (Main SVG canvas)
│   ├── SketchCanvas.module.css              (Canvas styles)
│   ├── ShapeRenderer.jsx                    (Individual shape rendering)
│   └── GridRenderer.jsx                     (Grid pattern rendering)
└── ui/
    ├── SketchToolbar.jsx                    (Tool palette, undo/redo)
    ├── SketchToolbar.module.css             (Toolbar styles)

    └── SketchEmptyState.module.css          (Empty state styles)
```

---

## 10. KEY TECHNICAL DETAILS

### Grid System
- Minor: 50mm × 50mm cells
- Major: 1000mm × 1000mm (contains 20×20 minor grid)
- Non-scaling stroke for zoom independence
- SVG pattern-based (efficient, infinite)

### Shape Storage Format
```javascript
{
  id: "shape_...",
  type: 'rect'|'ellipse'|'line'|'path',
  layerId: "layer_...",
  x: number, y: number,
  width: number, height: number,
  points: [{x, y}, ...],  // For line/path
  fill: string,
  stroke: string,
  strokeWidth: number,
  rotation: degrees
}
```

### Canvas Sizing
- Default: 297 × 210 mm (A4 landscape)
- Stored in mm, rendered via SVG transform
- Boundary shown as dashed outline
- Extensible: Can support custom sizes

### History System
- Snapshots stored as JSON strings
- Max 80 entries (HISTORY_LIMIT)
- Undo empties future array
- Redo pops from future array
- Dirty flag: Compares current to savedSnapshot

### Empty State Logic
```javascript
showEmptyState = !hasShapes && !hasObjects && !emptyStateDismissed
```
Dismissable by drawing or selecting "Try Demo Object"

---

## 11. INTEGRATION POINTS

### Uses from Main App
- `@/domain/ids` - generateId()
- `@/ui/` - Modal, InputField, Tooltip, CompassOverlay (via core)
- `@/three/viewer` - ThreePreviewPanel (sibling module)
- `@/persistence/localStorageBackend` - Storage (potential future)

### Can be used by Main App
- `SketchWorkspace` - Full-page sketch editor
- `useSketch()` - Access model data and dispatch
- `useSketchEditor()` - Access UI state and dispatch
- Domain models: createSketchProject, createSketchObject, createShape, etc.

content.text:
Perfect! Now I have all the information requested. Let me provide you with a comprehensive summary:

## Complete File Analysis

### 1. **createPreviewViewport.js** - WebGL Viewport Creation
**Location:** `/c/Users/johnm/modular apartment planner/src/three/viewer/createPreviewViewport.js`

**Purpose:** Creates and manages the Three.js WebGL viewport for 3D preview rendering.

**Key Components:**
- **Scene Setup:**
  - THREE.Scene with transparent background
  - Three lighting layers: AmbientLight (0.72), HemisphereLight (0.7), DirectionalLight (1.05)
  - THREE.PerspectiveCamera (FOV: 42°, near: 10, far: 100000)
  - THREE.WebGLRenderer with sRGB color space, high-performance preference

- **Navigation Modes:**
  - Inspect mode (orbit controls)
  - Walk mode (first-person noclip flight)

- **Public API Returns Object with Methods:**
  - `setWorld(nextRoot, bounds, groundLevel)` - Updates 3D scene content
  - `resetView()` - Resets camera to initial view
  - `fit()` - Fits view to bounds (alias for resetView)
  - `setProjectionPreset(presetName)` - Changes camera preset
  - `setPickHandler(handler)` - Sets click-to-select callback
  - `setPickContext(nextContext)` - Sets active floor for picking
  - `setNavigationMode` - Switches between inspect/walk modes
  - `setActiveFloorContext(nextContext)` - Sets current floor and spawn point
  - `setWalkUiHandler(handler)` - Updates walk UI state
  - `setWalkExitHandler(handler)` - Callback when exiting walk mode
  - `setCompassHeadingHandler(handler)` - Updates compass needle rotation
  - `resize()` - Handles canvas resize
  - `dispose()` - Cleanup and resource disposal
  - `materialPalette` - Exported material instance

**State Management:**
- Navigation mode (inspect/walk)
- World root (Three.js Object3D)
- Grid helper
- Current bounds
- Walk pose by floor ID (Map)
- Pick handler and context
- Active floor context with floorId and spawn point

**Interaction:**
- Pointer events (down/up/cancel/leave) for click picking
- Click distance threshold (3 pixels) to distinguish clicks from drags

---

### 2. **createInspectNavigation.js** - Orbit Controls Setup
**Location:** `/c/Users/johnm/modular apartment planner/src/three/viewer/createInspectNavigation.js`

**Purpose:** Wraps Three.js OrbitControls with additional state management for inspect mode.

**OrbitControls Configuration:**
- `enableDamping: true` - Smooth deceleration
- `dampingFactor: 0.08` - Damping strength
- `screenSpacePanning: true` - Pan in screen space
- `minDistance: 400` - Minimum zoom distance
- `maxDistance: 150000` - Maximum zoom distance
- `maxPolarAngle: Math.PI * 0.495` - Prevents flipping over top

**Public API Returns Object with Methods:**
- `update()` - Updates controls each frame
- `setBounds(bounds)` - Sets view boundaries
- `setEnabled(enabled)` - Enable/disable controls
- `resetView()` - Fits camera to bounds using fitCameraToBox
- `setProjectionPreset(presetName)` - Changes camera preset
- `captureState()` - Returns {position, target} arrays
- `restoreState(state)` - Restores saved camera state
- `dispose()` - Cleanup controls

---

### 3. **disposeScene.js** - Cleanup Utilities
**Location:** `/c/Users/johnm/modular apartment planner/src/three/viewer/disposeScene.js`

**Purpose:** Recursively disposes Three.js resources (geometries and materials).

**Function Signature:**
```javascript
disposeScene(root, options = {})
```

**Parameters:**
- `root` - Three.js Object3D to traverse
- `options.disposeMaterials` - Boolean (default: false) - Whether to dispose materials

**Behavior:**
- Traverses all nodes in the object tree
- Always disposes geometries
- Conditionally disposes materials (single or arrays)
- Uses optional chaining to safely call dispose() if it exists

---

### 4. **ThreePreviewPanel.jsx** - Existing 3D Preview Panel
**Location:** `/c/Users/johnm/modular apartment planner/src/three/viewer/ThreePreviewPanel.jsx`

**Component Props:**
```javascript
{
  project,           // Full project data
  activeFloorId,     // Currently selected floor
  isMaximized,       // Boolean, default false
  onToggleMaximize,  // Callback for maximize button
  className          // Additional CSS classes, default ''
}
```

**State:**
- `previewScope` - 'all' or specific floorId
- `navigationMode` - 'inspect' or 'walk'
- `walkUiState` - {navigationMode, isLocked, canLock}

**Hooks Used:**

## Complete File Analysis

### 1. **createPreviewViewport.js** - WebGL Viewport Creation
**Location:** `/c/Users/johnm/modular apartment planner/src/three/viewer/createPreviewViewport.js`

**Purpose:** Creates and manages the Three.js WebGL viewport for 3D preview rendering.

**Key Components:**
- **Scene Setup:**
  - THREE.Scene with transparent background
  - Three lighting layers: AmbientLight (0.72), HemisphereLight (0.7), DirectionalLight (1.05)
  - THREE.PerspectiveCamera (FOV: 42°, near: 10, far: 100000)
  - THREE.WebGLRenderer with sRGB color space, high-performance preference

- **Navigation Modes:**
  - Inspect mode (orbit controls)
  - Walk mode (first-person noclip flight)

- **Public API Returns Object with Methods:**
  - `setWorld(nextRoot, bounds, groundLevel)` - Updates 3D scene content
  - `resetView()` - Resets camera to initial view
  - `fit()` - Fits view to bounds (alias for resetView)
  - `setProjectionPreset(presetName)` - Changes camera preset
  - `setPickHandler(handler)` - Sets click-to-select callback
  - `setPickContext(nextContext)` - Sets active floor for picking
  - `setNavigationMode` - Switches between inspect/walk modes
  - `setActiveFloorContext(nextContext)` - Sets current floor and spawn point
  - `setWalkUiHandler(handler)` - Updates walk UI state
  - `setWalkExitHandler(handler)` - Callback when exiting walk mode
  - `setCompassHeadingHandler(handler)` - Updates compass needle rotation
  - `resize()` - Handles canvas resize
  - `dispose()` - Cleanup and resource disposal
  - `materialPalette` - Exported material instance

**State Management:**
- Navigation mode (inspect/walk)
- World root (Three.js Object3D)
- Grid helper
- Current bounds
- Walk pose by floor ID (Map)
- Pick handler and context
- Active floor context with floorId and spawn point

**Interaction:**
- Pointer events (down/up/cancel/leave) for click picking
- Click distance threshold (3 pixels) to distinguish clicks from drags

---

### 2. **createInspectNavigation.js** - Orbit Controls Setup
**Location:** `/c/Users/johnm/modular apartment planner/src/three/viewer/createInspectNavigation.js`

**Purpose:** Wraps Three.js OrbitControls with additional state management for inspect mode.

**OrbitControls Configuration:**
- `enableDamping: true` - Smooth deceleration
- `dampingFactor: 0.08` - Damping strength
- `screenSpacePanning: true` - Pan in screen space
- `minDistance: 400` - Minimum zoom distance
- `maxDistance: 150000` - Maximum zoom distance
- `maxPolarAngle: Math.PI * 0.495` - Prevents flipping over top

**Public API Returns Object with Methods:**
- `update()` - Updates controls each frame
- `setBounds(bounds)` - Sets view boundaries
- `setEnabled(enabled)` - Enable/disable controls
- `resetView()` - Fits camera to bounds using fitCameraToBox
- `setProjectionPreset(presetName)` - Changes camera preset
- `captureState()` - Returns {position, target} arrays
- `restoreState(state)` - Restores saved camera state
- `dispose()` - Cleanup controls

---

### 3. **disposeScene.js** - Cleanup Utilities
**Location:** `/c/Users/johnm/modular apartment planner/src/three/viewer/disposeScene.js`

**Purpose:** Recursively disposes Three.js resources (geometries and materials).

**Function Signature:**
```javascript
disposeScene(root, options = {})
```

**Parameters:**
- `root` - Three.js Object3D to traverse
- `options.disposeMaterials` - Boolean (default: false) - Whether to dispose materials

**Behavior:**
- Traverses all nodes in the object tree
- Always disposes geometries
- Conditionally disposes materials (single or arrays)
- Uses optional chaining to safely call dispose() if it exists

message.content:
Refactor Sketch Studio into a more accurate and robust parametric object drafting workspace.

Main goal:
Make Sketch Studio dimension-driven, assembly-based, and much more reliable for building standalone objects such as tables, desks, chairs, shelves, cabinets, and similar items.

Requirements:

1. Core modeling direction
- treat Sketch as a serious object-drafting workspace, not a loose drawing toy
- prioritize geometric accuracy, dimension-driven editing, and robust object relationships
- use real units in millimeters as the source of truth

2. Domain model
Create or refactor Sketch domain models to support:
- SketchProject
- Assembly
- Part
- PartType
- PartInstance
- Dimension
- Constraint
- Attachment

3. Part system
Support a first robust set of part primitives:
- Panel
- Leg
- Frame bar
- Cutout
- Hole pattern

Each part should support meaningful dimensions such as width, height, depth, thickness, and placement/orientation data.

4. Assembly system
- allow multiple parts to belong to an assembly
- support parent/child relationships where useful
- support object trees for assemblies
- make assemblies editable as grouped objects

5. Dimension-driven editing
- dimensions must drive geometry
- editing width/height/depth/thickness should update the object reliably
- avoid loose freeform editing as the primary workflow

6. Attachment / relationship system
Support useful object relationships such as:
- attach to face
- align to edge
- center on axis
- inset from edge
- flush with surface

These relationships should be reusable and not hardcoded to specific object names.

7. Orthographic drafting
- maintain accurate top, front, and side views
- keep orthographic generation modular and separate from React
- ensure parts and assemblies render consistently across views

8. 3D preview
- keep the Three.js preview read-only for now
- render assemblies and parts consistently from the same source model
- do not move source-of-truth logic into the 3D layer

9. Sheet/export readiness
- prepare Sketch for better assembly sheets and part detail sheets
- keep export modular and compatible with the current sheet system

10. Architecture
- keep Sketch separate from Floorplan domain logic
- reuse shared geometry/rendering/annotation utilities where appropriate
- do not overbuild freeform modeling or manufacturing-grade simulation yet
- focus on a precise, extensible foundation

Implementation expectations:
- first identify the weaknesses of the current Sketch workspace
- refactor incrementally without breaking the existing app shell and routing
- keep code understandable and modular
- prioritize robustness and correctness over flashy features

content.text: I'll start by thoroughly exploring the current Sketch workspace implementation to understand its strengths, weaknesses, and what needs to change. Let me also read the existing plan file.

content.content:
1→# Sketch V1: Object-Design Workspace
     2→
     3→## Context
     4→
     5→The Sketch module currently has a generic layers/shapes model (rect, ellipse, line, path). The goal is to transform it into a **constrained object-design workspace** where users assemble furniture (tables, desks, shelves, cabinets, bed frames) from typed parts, view them in orthographic drafting views, preview in 3D, and export to sheets — all while keeping Sketch separate from Floorplan logic and reusing shared infrastructure.
     6→
     7→## Architecture Decisions
     8→
     9→- **Parts/assemblies replace layers/shapes** — layers don't serve furniture design. Parts are atomic 3D primitives; assemblies group them.
    10→- **Single viewport with view switching** (top / front / side) — simpler than multi-viewport CAD; view switcher in toolbar.
    11→- **Coordinate system**: X = left-right, Y = front-back (depth), Z = up-down (height). All millimeters.
    12→- **3D preview** in a right-side panel (like floorplan's ThreePreviewPanel), read-only orbit.
    13→- **Persistence** uses the same localStorage backend pattern with a `sketch-planner-` key prefix.
    14→
    15→### Orthographic Projection Mapping
    16→| View  | SVG X      | SVG Y           | SVG W       | SVG H       |
    17→|-------|------------|-----------------|-------------|-------------|
    18→| Top   | position.x | position.y      | partWidth   | partDepth   |
    19→| Front | position.x | -(position.z+h) | partWidth   | partHeight  |
    20→| Side  | position.y | -(position.z+h) | partDepth   | partHeight  |
    21→
    22→### Part Types
    23→| Type      | Key Properties                                        | Semantics                   |
    24→|-----------|-------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------|
    25→| Panel     | width, depth, thickness, material                     | Flat slab (tabletop, shelf) |
    26→| Leg       | width, depth, height, profile (square/round/tapered)  | Vertical support            |
    27→| Frame     | width, height, length, axis (x/y)                     | Rail, stretcher, apron      |
    28→| Cutout    | parentId, width, height, depth, offsetX, offsetY      | Subtractive rect on panel   |
    29→| Hole      | parentId, diameter, depth, offsetX, offsetY            | Subtractive circle on panel |
    30→| Dimension | startPoint{x,y,z}, endPoint{x,y,z}, offset, textOverride | Measurement annotation   |
    31→
    32→All parts share: `id, type, name, assemblyId, parentId, position:{x,y,z}, rotation:{x,y,z}, fill, stroke, strokeWidth`
    33→
    34→---
    35→
    36→## Step 1: Domain Models & Constants
    37→
    38→**Create** `src/modules/sketch/domain/partModels.js`
    39→- Import `generateId` from `@/domain/ids`
    40→- `createPartBase(type, overrides)` — shared base with id, position, rotation, style
    41→- `createPanel(overrides)` → defaults: width=600, depth=400, thickness=18, material='plywood'
    42→- `createLeg(overrides)` → defaults: width=40, depth=40, height=720, profile='square'
    43→- `createFrame(overrides)` → defaults: width=40, height=60, length=500, axis='x'
    44→- `createCutout(overrides)` → parentId required, width=100, height=50, depth=18
    45→- `createHole(overrides)` → parentId required, diameter=35, depth=18
    46→- `createDimension(overrides)` → startPoint, endPoint, offset=200, textOverride=null
    47→
    48→**Create** `src/modules/sketch/domain/partDefaults.js`
    49→- `PART_DEFAULTS` — default dimension sets keyed by part type string
    50→- `MATERIAL_OPTIONS`, `LEG_PROFILE_OPTIONS`, `FRAME_AXIS_OPTIONS` — select dropdown values
    51→
    52→**Create** `src/modules/sketch/domain/assemblyModels.js`
    53→- `createAssembly(name, overrides)` → id (generateId('asm')), name, description, category, partIds[]
    54→- `addPartToAssembly(assembly, partId)` → new assembly with partId appended
    55→- `removePartFromAssembly(assembly, partId)` → new assembly with partId filtered
    56→
    57→**Create** `src/modules/sketch/domain/viewProjection.js`
    58→- `VIEWS = { TOP:'top', FRONT:'front', SIDE:'side' }`
    59→- `projectPartToView(part, view)` → `{ svgX, svgY, svgWidth, svgHeight }` — core projection
    60→- `viewToModelPosition(svgX, svgY, view, existingPosition)` → `{ x, y, z }` — inverse for placement
    61→- `viewToModelExtents(svgW, svgH, view, partType)` → dimension fields for the given view
    62→- `getPartExtents(part)` → `{ width, depth, height }` normalized across all part types
    63→- `getViewLabel(view)` → 'Top (X–Y)', 'Front (X–Z)', 'Side (Y–Z)'
    64→
    65→**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/domain/defaults.js`
    66→- Replace SKETCH_TOOLS: remove RECTANGLE/ELLIPSE/LINE/PEN, add PANEL/LEG/FRAME/CUTOUT/HOLE/DIMENSION
    67→- Add `SKETCH_VIEWS = { TOP:'top', FRONT:'front', SIDE:'side' }`
    68→
    69→**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/domain/sketchModels.js`
    70→- `createSketchProject(name)` returns `{ id, name, description, category, canvasWidth, canvasHeight, parts:[], assemblies:[], annotations:[], sheets:[], createdAt, updatedAt }`
    71→- Remove `createLayer`, `createShape`, `createSketchObject` (moved to partModels/assemblyModels)
    72→- Keep `createAnnotation`
    73→
    74→---
    75→
    76→## Step 2: SketchProvider — Parts/Assemblies State
    77→
    78→**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/app/SketchProvider.jsx`
    79→
    80→Remove actions: LAYER_ADD/UPDATE/DELETE/REORDER, SHAPE_ADD/UPDATE/DELETE, OBJECT_ADD/UPDATE/DELETE
    81→
    82→Add actions:
    83→- `PART_ADD` — `{ part }` → append to project.parts
    84→- `PART_UPDATE` — `{ part: { id, ...changes } }` → merge into matching part (supports nested position/rotation)
    85→- `PART_DELETE` — `{ partId }` → remove from parts, also remove from assembly.partIds, also delete child parts (cutouts/holes with parentId)
    86→- `ASSEMBLY_ADD` — `{ assembly }` → append to project.assemblies
    87→- `ASSEMBLY_UPDATE` — `{ assembly: { id, ...changes } }` → merge
    88→- `ASSEMBLY_DELETE` — `{ assemblyId }` → remove assembly, clear assemblyId on orphaned parts
    89→- `ASSEMBLY_ADD_PART` — `{ assemblyId, partId }` → add partId to assembly.partIds + set part.assemblyId
    90→- `ASSEMBLY_REMOVE_PART` — `{ assemblyId, partId }` → remove from partIds + clear part.assemblyId
    91→
    92→Update `useSketch()` return:
    93→```js
    94→{ project, isDirty, canUndo, canRedo, dispatch,
    95→  getPart(id), getAssembly(id), getPartsForAssembly(asmId), getChildParts(parentId) }
    96→```
    97→
    98→Remove `getLayer`, `getObject`, `getShapesForObject`. Remove `updateLayer` helper, add `updatePart`/`updateAssembly` helpers.
    99→
   100→---
   101→
   102→## Step 3: SketchEditorProvider — View State
   103→
   104→**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/app/SketchEditorProvider.jsx`
   105→
   106→Update initial state:
   107→- Remove: `activeLayerId`, `activeObjectId`
   108→- Add: `activeView: 'top'`, `activeAssemblyId: null`
   109→
   110→Add actions:
   111→- `SET_VIEW` — `{ view }` → set activeView
   112→- `SET_ACTIVE_ASSEMBLY` — `{ assemblyId }` → set activeAssemblyId
   113→
   114→Remove: `SET_ACTIVE_LAYER`, `SET_ACTIVE_OBJECT`
   115→
   116→Remove `initialActiveLayerId` prop from provider component.
   117→
   118→---
   119→
   120→## Step 4: Part Renderer & View-Aware Canvas
   121→
   122→**Create** `src/modules/sketch/renderers/PartRenderer.jsx`
   123→- Props: `{ part, view, isSelected, zoom }`
   124→- Calls `projectPartToView(part, view)` → renders `<rect>` (or `<ellipse>` for holes in top view)
   125→- Selection highlight: dashed outline offset by 4/zoom
   126→- Cutout/hole: dashed stroke, lighter fill to indicate subtractive
   127→- `data-part-id={part.id}` attribute for hit-testing
   128→
   129→**Create** `src/modules/sketch/renderers/DimensionRenderer.jsx`
   130→- Props: `{ dimension, view, zoom }`
   131→- Projects dimension's startPoint/endPoint to 2D via view
   132→- Calls `createDimensionFigure` from `@/annotations/dimensions` with 2D projected points
   133→- Renders extension lines, arrowheads, and text label as SVG
   134→
   135→**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/renderers/SketchCanvas.jsx`
   136→- Replace `ShapeRenderer` import → `PartRenderer` + `DimensionRenderer`
   137→- Read `activeView` from `useSketchEditor()`
   138→- Replace `visibleShapes` loop → `project.parts.filter(p => p.type !== 'dimension')` for PartRenderer, dimensions separately
   139→- Replace rect/line previews → single generic drag-preview rect for any part tool
   140→- Update status bar: show view label, map cursor coords through projection inverse for XYZ display
   141→- Remove all `activeLayerId` references
   142→- Update `useSketchTool()` switch to match new tool names (panel, leg, frame, cutout, hole, dimension)
   143→
   144→**Delete** `src/modules/sketch/renderers/ShapeRenderer.jsx` (replaced by PartRenderer)
   145→
   146→---
   147→
   148→## Step 5: Editor Handlers
   149→
   150→**Create** `src/modules/sketch/editor/handlers/partPlaceHandler.js`
   151→- `createPartPlaceHandler({ dispatch, editorDispatch, activeView, activeAssemblyId, partType })`
   152→- Generic click-drag handler for panel, leg, frame (and cutout when a panel is selected)
   153→- onMouseDown: start drawing (record startPos)
   154→- onMouseMove: update preview (record currentPos)
   155→- onMouseUp: compute 2D extents → `viewToModelPosition` + `viewToModelExtents` → create part via factory → `PART_ADD` → auto `ASSEMBLY_ADD_PART` if activeAssemblyId
   156→- For cutout/hole: requires selectedId to be a panel; sets `parentId` on created part; positions relative to parent
   157→
   158→**Create** `src/modules/sketch/editor/handlers/dimensionHandler.js`
   159→- `createDimensionHandler({ dispatch, editorDispatch, activeView })`
   160→- Two-click: first click sets startPoint, second click creates dimension
   161→- Projects 2D clicks to 3D via `viewToModelPosition`
   162→- Creates dimension via `createDimension`, dispatches `PART_ADD`
   163→
   164→**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/editor/handlers/selectHandler.js`
   165→- Replace shape hit-testing → part hit-testing using `projectPartToView`
   166→- Iterate parts in reverse, test point-in-projected-rect with zoom-aware tolerance
   167→- Delete dispatches `PART_DELETE` instead of `SHAPE_DELETE`
   168→- Drag-to-move: delta in SVG space → `viewToModelPosition` delta → `PART_UPDATE` position
   169→- Remove all layer/shape references
   170→
   171→**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/editor/tools.js`
   172→- New shortcuts: V=select, P=panel, G=leg, F=frame, C=cutout, H=hole, M=dimension
   173→
   174→**Delete** `src/modules/sketch/editor/handlers/rectangleHandler.js`, `lineHandler.js` (replaced by partPlaceHandler)
   175→
   176→---
   177→
   178→## Step 6: Toolbar, Sidebar, Properties Panel
   179→
   180→**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/ui/SketchToolbar.jsx`
   181→- Replace tool buttons: Select, Panel, Leg, Frame, Cutout, Hole, Dimension (with new SVG icons)
   182→- Add view switcher group: Top / Front / Side buttons (dispatches `SET_VIEW`)
   183→- Keep undo/redo, grid/snap toggles
   184→
   185→**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/ui/SketchSidebar.jsx`
   186→- Replace Objects + Layers sections → Assemblies + Parts sections
   187→- Assemblies: list with add/delete, click sets activeAssemblyId, shows part count
   188→- Parts: list (filtered to active assembly if set), shows type badge + name, click selects, delete button
   189→- Remove all layer-related code
   190→
   191→**Create** `src/modules/sketch/ui/SketchPropertiesPanel.jsx` + `.module.css`
   192→- Reads selectedId from editor, gets part via `getPart()`
   193→- Sections: Name (text), Type (badge), Position (X/Y/Z number inputs), Dimensions (type-specific fields), Style (fill/stroke), Assembly (assign/unassign)
   194→- Uses `InputField` from `@/core/ui` for number inputs
   195→- Dispatches `PART_UPDATE` on change
   196→
   197→**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/ui/SketchEmptyState.jsx`
   198→- "Start Drawing" → activates panel tool
   199→- "Try Demo Object" → creates demo table from parts (Step 7)
   200→
   201→**Modify** `src/modules/sketch/SketchWorkspace.jsx` + `.module.css`
   202→- Remove `initialActiveLayerId` prop plumbing
   203→- Add right panel containing `SketchPropertiesPanel` (top) and 3D preview (bottom, Step 7)
   204→- Grid: `toolbar toolbar toolbar / sidebar canvas rightpanel`
   205→
   206→---
   207→
   208→## Step 7: 3D Preview & Demo Object
   209→
   210→**Create** `src/modules/sketch/renderers/buildSketchPreview.js`
   211→- `buildSketchPreviewRoot(parts, selectedId)` → `THREE.Group`
   212→- `createPanelMesh(part)` → `BoxGeometry(width, thickness, depth)` + MeshStandardMaterial
   213→- `createLegMesh(part)` → BoxGeometry (square profile) or CylinderGeometry (round profile)
   214→- `createFrameMesh(part)` → BoxGeometry along axis
   215→- Coordinate mapping: Three.x = part.x + w/2, Three.y = part.z + h/2, Three.z = part.y + d/2
   216→- Selection: tint material color for selectedId

   222→- Uses `createInspectNavigation` from `@/three/viewer/createInspectNavigation` (orbit only)
   223→- On parts change: rebuild root via `buildSketchPreviewRoot`, set scene

   233→
   234→## Step 8: Persistence & Sheet/Export

   261→## File Summary

   308→### Shared infrastructure reused (not modified)
